guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 4. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_e: Point to the big E and say: eeeeee. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_r: Now point to the big R and say: rrrrrr.

parent_story: Ben the rabbit saw a red pen. He ran to get the red pen. Ben is very happy.
